title: justify-content
description: Controls how flex items are distributed along the main axis. By default that's the horizontal axis. Use it to center, align, or spread items within a flex container.
html: Home About Contact
challenge: Spread the nav links so Home is on the left and Contact is on the right, with About in the middle.

alternatives.name: Auto margin push
alternatives.description: Add margin-inline-start: auto to a single item to push it to the far end. More precise than space-between when only one item needs to be separated from the rest.
